rows.name: Mississippi State Board of Medical Licensure
rows.mandate: Licenses and disciplines Mississippi physicians. Nine physician members appointed by the Governor with Senate consent (Miss. Code § 73-43-3).

rows.name: Mississippi State Board of Education
rows.mandate: Governs Mississippi public education policy. Nine members — five appointed by the Governor, two each by the Lt. Governor and House Speaker (Miss. Const. § 202A).
rows.criticalNote: Inventory listing — apply any time · 5 of 9 seats are governor-appointed
